title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Park Avenue

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Park Avenue
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!
